title: Add null argument validation to SCHC public APIs
description: Trigger: lichen_schc_compress() receives packet == NULL with pkt_len >= 40, or out == NULL with enough out_len; lichen_schc_decompress() receives NULL data/out. lichen/subsys/lichen/schc/schc.c dereferences these public API arguments around lines 1083 and 1165 without null checks. Impact: malformed API input can crash the node instead of returning SCHC_ERR_INVALID_PACKET or SCHC_ERR_BUFFER_TOO_SMALL. Add explicit null validation at public entry points and tests for NULL inputs.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
